About

Engineering Mind,
Business Ambition.

At a glance
UniversityUniversity of Kansas
DegreeB.S. Mechanical Engineering · Business Minor
GPA3.9 / 4.0
Career TargetManagement Consulting
Focus AreaProduct Development · Operations · Supply Chain
Prior ExperienceSiemens · Champion Sportswear · Nooter Construction
Based inSt. Louis, MO

Outside of engineering, I play drums, shoot photography, and have a long-standing fascination with marine biology. I'm drawn to systems that are complex, interconnected, and not fully understood. That curiosity carries into everything I do.

At KU, I work as a Student Ambassador, and past Research Assistant in the Human Motion Control Lab, analyzing biomechanics data alongside PhD researchers. Through the SELF Engineering Leadership Fellows program I serve as Cohort Co-Lead — leading our Community Service Project and co-leading a biomedical engineering design competition for high school students.

On the professional side, I worked as a Marketing Intern at Champion Sportswear, completed an Engineering Internship at Nooter Construction, and most recently served as a Business Operations and Commercial Enablement Intern at Siemens Digital Industries Software.

Experience & Highlights

Where I've built
the foundation.

Internship
Siemens Digital Industries Software
Business Operations & Commercial Enablement Intern

Developed and standardized cross-functional process documentation for sales, operations, and commercial teams — translating complex workflows into structured frameworks that streamlined internal operations and supported revenue-generating initiatives.

Competition
National Case Competitions
1st Best in Midwest · 1st UMSL International · 3rd Wisconsin

Three national placements across sponsored competitions — led implementation strategy, risk mitigation, and narrative framework evaluated by Accenture, McKinsey, and Deloitte.

Project
SolidWorks Rover Project
University of Kansas

End-to-end mechanical design and modeling of a rover system, applying engineering fundamentals in a hands-on project environment.

Venture
Kirkendall Ideation Challenge
1st Place · Applied AI · Product Development

Placed 1st in a ten-week entrepreneurial startup competition. Designed, programmed, and built an AI-integrated K-12 educational platform — leading end-to-end product development: ideation, prototyping, stakeholder interviews, and go-to-market strategy.
